en: "I am the true vine, and my Father is the vinedresser.
zh: “我是真葡萄樹，我父是培植的人。

en: Every branch of mine that does not bear fruit he takes away, and every branch that does bear fruit he prunes, that it may bear more fruit.
zh: 所有屬我而不結果子的枝子，他就剪去；所有結果子的，他就修剪乾淨，讓它結更多的果子。

en: Already you are clean because of the word that I have spoken to you.
zh: 現在你們因著我對你們所講的道，已經乾淨了。

en: Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit by itself, unless it abides in the vine, neither can you, unless you abide in me.
zh: 你們要住在我裡面，我也就住在你們裡面。枝子若不連在葡萄樹上，自己就不能結果子；你們若不住在我裡面，也是這樣。

en: I am the vine; you are the branches. Whoever abides in me and I in him, he it is that bears much fruit, for apart from me you can do nothing.
zh: 我是葡萄樹，你們是枝子。住在我裡面的，我也住在他裡面，他就結出很多果子；因為離開了我，你們就不能作甚麼。

en: If anyone does not abide in me he is thrown away like a branch and withers; and the branches are gathered, thrown into the fire, and burned.
zh: 人若不住在我裡面，就像枝子丟在外面枯乾了，人把它們拾起來，丟在火裡燒掉了。

en: If you abide in me, and my words abide in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be done for you.
zh: 你們若住在我裡面，我的話也留在你們裡面；無論你們想要甚麼，祈求，就給你們成就。

en: By this my Father is glorified, that you bear much fruit and so prove to be my disciples.
zh: 這樣，你們結出很多果子，我父就因此得榮耀，你們也就是我的門徒了。

en: As the Father has loved me, so have I loved you. Abide in my love.
zh: 父怎樣愛我，我也怎樣愛你們；你們要住在我的愛裡。

en: If you keep my commandments, you will abide in my love, just as I have kept my Father's commandments and abide in his love.
zh: 如果你們遵守我的命令，就必定住在我的愛裡，正像我遵守了我父的命令，住在他的愛裡一樣。

en: These things I have spoken to you, that my joy may be in you, and that your joy may be full.
zh: “我把這些事告訴了你們，好讓我的喜樂存在你們心裡，並且使你們的喜樂滿溢。

en: "This is my commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you.
zh: 你們要彼此相愛，像我愛你們一樣，這就是我的命令。

en: Greater love has no one than this, that someone lays down his life for his friends.
zh: 人為朋友捨命，人間的愛沒有比這個更大的了。

en: You are my friends if you do what I command you.
zh: 你們若行我所吩咐你們的，就是我的朋友了。

en: No longer do I call you servants, for the servant does not know what his master is doing; but I have called you friends, for all that I have heard from my Father I have made known to you.
zh: 我不再稱你們為僕人，因為僕人不知道主人所作的事；我已經稱你們為朋友了，因為我從我父那裡聽見的一切，都已經告訴你們了。

en: You did not choose me, but I chose you and appointed you that you should go and bear fruit and that your fruit should abide, so that whatever you ask the Father in my name, he may give it to you.
zh: 不是你們揀選了我，而是我揀選了你們，並且分派你們去結果子，就是結常存的果子，使你們奉我的名，無論向父求甚麼，他必定賜給你們。

en: These things I command you, so that you will love one another.
zh: 我把這些事吩咐你們，是要你們彼此相愛。

en: "If the world hates you, know that it has hated me before it hated you.
zh: “如果世人恨你們，你們要知道他們在恨你們以先，已經恨我了。

en: If you were of the world, the world would love you as its own; but because you are not of the world, but I chose you out of the world, therefore the world hates you.
zh: 你們若屬於這世界，世人必定愛屬自己的；但因為你們不屬於世界，而是我從世界中揀選了你們，所以世人就恨你們。

en: Remember the word that I said to you: 'A servant is not greater than his master.' If they persecuted me, they will also persecute you. If they kept my word, they will also keep yours.
zh: 你們要記住我對你們說過的話：‘僕人不能大過主人。’他們若迫害我，也必定迫害你們；他們若遵守我的話，也必定遵守你們的話。

en: But all these things they will do to you on account of my name, because they do not know him who sent me.
zh: 但他們因著我的名，要向你們行這一切，因為他們不認識那差我來的。

en: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not have been guilty of sin, but now they have no excuse for their sin.
zh: 如果我沒有來，也沒有對他們講過甚麼，他們就沒有罪；但現在他們的罪是無可推諉的了。

en: Whoever hates me hates my Father also.
zh: 恨我的，也恨我的父。

en: If I had not done among them the works that no one else did, they would not be guilty of sin, but now they have seen and hated both me and my Father.
zh: 如果我沒有在他們中間作過別人沒有作過的事，他們就沒有罪；但現在我和我的父，他們都看見了，也都恨惡。

en: But the word that is written in their Law must be fulfilled: 'They hated me without a cause.'
zh: 這就應驗了他們律法上所寫的話：‘他們無故地恨我。’

en: "But when the Helper comes, whom I will send to you from the Father, the Spirit of truth, who proceeds from the Father, he will bear witness about me.
zh: “我從父那裡要差來給你們的保惠師，就是從父那裡出來的真理的靈，他來到的時候，要為我作見證。

en: And you also will bear witness, because you have been with me from the beginning.
zh: 你們也要作見證，因為從開始你們就是跟我在一起的。”
